commentaries.author: Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: And has saved many by coming and calling us when hastening to destruction.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Accuses the Sardians of "works not full; "

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: For it is not enough for a tree to live and to have no fruit, even as it is not enough to be called a Christian and to confess Christ, but not to have Himself in our work, that is, not to do His precepts.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
